allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from circuit_synth import circuit, Component, Net; print\('✅ OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from circuit_synth import circuit, Component, Net; print\('circuit-synth OK'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(b['name']\) for b in data[:10]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(b['name']\) for b in data if 'main' in b['name'].lower\(\) or 'master' in b['name'].lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('branch:', d.get\('ref','?'\)\); print\('size:', len\(d.get\('content',''\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name']\) for f in data]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['name']\) for t in data]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name']\) for f in data[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name']\) for f in data[:10]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name']\) for f in data if 'Device' in f['name']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(data[0] if data else 'empty'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name']\) for f in data if 'timer' in f['name'].lower\(\) or '555' in f['name'].lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name']\) for f in data if f['name'].endswith\('.kicad_sym'\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('engine:', d.get\('engine'\)\); print\('kicad_sch bytes:', len\(d.get\('kicad_sch',''\)\)\); print\('kicad_pcb bytes:', len\(d.get\('kicad_pcb',''\)\)\); print\('error:', d.get\('error'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); open\(''''apps/web/public/test-lm7805.kicad_sch'''',''''w'''',encoding=''''utf-8''''\).write\(d[''''kicad_sch_content'''']\); print\(''''lm7805 ok'''', len\(d[''''kicad_sch_content'''']\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); open\(''''apps/web/public/test-ne555.kicad_sch'''',''''w'''',encoding=''''utf-8''''\).write\(d[''''kicad_sch_content'''']\); print\(''''ne555 ok'''', len\(d[''''kicad_sch_content'''']\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); open\(''''apps/web/public/test-esp32.kicad_sch'''',''''w'''',encoding=''''utf-8''''\).write\(d[''''kicad_sch_content'''']\); print\(''''esp32 ok'''', len\(d[''''kicad_sch_content'''']\)\)")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8766 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_-Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8766/health -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).StatusCode")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''/tmp/lm7805.json''\)\); open\(''apps/web/public/test-lm7805.kicad_sch'',''w'',encoding=''utf-8''\).write\(d[''kicad_sch_content'']\); print\(''lm7805:'', len\(d[''kicad_sch_content'']\), ''bytes, success:'', d.get\(''success''\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import circuit_synth; print\(''installed:'', circuit_synth.__version__ if hasattr\(circuit_synth,''__version__''\) else ''yes''\)")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''C:\\Program Files\\KiCad'' -Recurse -Filter ''Device.kicad_sym'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName; Get-ChildItem -Path ''C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\KiCad'' -Recurse -Filter ''Device.kicad_sym'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_Path -like ''*chrome-profile*'' -or $_CommandLine -like ''*chrome-devtools-mcp*'' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Name chrome -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Get-Process chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8766 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }; Start-Sleep 1; Write-Output done")

Bash(python -c "import json; r=json.load\(open\('/tmp/cs_response.json'\)\); print\('success:', r.get\('success'\)\); print\('error:', r.get\('error'\)\); sch=r.get\('kicad_sch_content',''\); pcb=r.get\('kicad_pcb_content',''\); print\('sch_len:', len\(sch\)\); print\('pcb_len:', len\(pcb\)\); print\('sch_head:', sch[:120]\); print\('pcb_head:', pcb[:120]\)")

Bash(services/kicad/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import json; r=json.load\(open\('cs_response.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('success:', r.get\('success'\)\); print\('error:', r.get\('error'\)\); sch=r.get\('kicad_sch_content'\) or ''; pcb=r.get\('kicad_pcb_content'\) or ''; print\('sch_len:', len\(sch\)\); print\('pcb_len:', len\(pcb\)\); print\('sch_head:', repr\(sch[:100]\)\); print\('pcb_head:', repr\(pcb[:100]\)\)")

Bash(services/kicad/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import os; os.environ.setdefault\('KICAD_SYMBOL_DIR', 'services/kicad/kicad-symbols'\); print\('symdir:', os.environ.get\('KICAD_SYMBOL_DIR'\),'exists?',os.path.isdir\(os.environ['KICAD_SYMBOL_DIR']\)\); from services.kicad.routers.circuit_synth import _circuit_synth_available; print\('cs_available:', _circuit_synth_available\(\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d.get\(k,''\) for k in ['name','version','scripts']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d.get\(k,''\) for k in ['name','version','dependencies','devDependencies']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['name']\) for x in d]")

hooks.command:
echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️ WORKFLOW OBLIGATOIRE
1. prompt-master → optimise le prompt
2. layrix-prompt-improver → contexte Layrix + skill
3. plan (si ≥2 fichiers) → tdd → code
4. code-reviewer → security-scan (si auth/API)
5. type-check → verify → commit+PR"}'
